_article: XXXIX.7 — chunks render a world that already exists in the compiled state; the chunk asks the Spatial Index 'what entities intersect my bounding box?' and renders them. Chunks are stateless renderers.
_description: Schema for the COMPILED Spatial Index — an R-tree (or equivalent) the World Compiler produces from the World Blueprint DSL. The simulation and the chunk renderer query this index in O(log n) to answer 'what entities are at/near (x,z)?' or 'what entities intersect this bounding box?'. The DSL is never queried at runtime for spatial questions; this index is.

query_patterns: chunk_load(bbox) -> [entity_id, ...] — what the chunk must render
perception_query(npc, radius) -> [entity_id, ...] — what an NPC can perceive
nearest(settlement_id, type, k) -> [entity_id, ...] — nearest k entities of a type (e.g. nearest spirit vein)
point_in_country(x, z) -> country_id — delegated to country_lookup (but seeded from this index)
invariants: Every entity with a spatial extent (point, polygon, or region) appears in the index.
Entities WITHOUT spatial extent (pure relationships, rumors in transit) do NOT appear — they live in the relationship_graph or their own trajectory index.
The index is REBUILT on compile; it is not mutated at runtime (except by trajectory entities updating their position, which updates the index entry).

schema.index_type: r_tree | quadtree | grid_hash — compiler-selected based on world scale

entries.entity_id: string — canonical entity id from the blueprint
entries.entity_type: enum — one of the entity types in dsl_specification §2

geometry.type: enum — point | polygon | region_ref | line_string | bbox
geometry.polygon_id: string — reference to a polygon in country_lookup (for countries, territories)
geometry.line_string_id: string — reference to a path (for roads, rivers)

entries.lod_fidelity: enum — distant | medium | near | full — which LOD regions include this entity at what fidelity (see lod_regions.schema.json)
entries.compiled_state_ref: string — path/reference to this entity's full compiled state (in the relevant sub-graph: settlement_graph, spirit_graph, etc.)
entries.momentum_ref: string|null — reference to this entity's live momentum in the momentum_registry (null if the entity has no momentum — pure decoration)

_compile_source: World Blueprint DSL v2 — all entities with a `facts.origin` or polygon/lane geometry
